channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: All my favorite DualSense colorways and special editions are discounted right now in Sony's Days of Play Sale
item.description: Sony's Days of Play sale is here and basically every single DualSense controller is reduced.

item.title: New Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide dummy unit shows off its 'insane thinness', and tells us just how worried Samsung is about the iPhone Fold
item.description: This could be what the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide is going to look like, though that probably won't be its name.

item.title: Donkey Kong 64 is finally coming to Nintendo Switch Online next week
item.description: It's been one of the most requested N64 games on Nintendo Switch Online for years.

item.title: 'Your bank should do the hard work for you': Monzo debuts possibly the best UK SIM deal just in time for summer — here’s how to join the waitlist
item.description: The mobile banking app Monzo is launching three new mobile phone plans in the UK —here's how Monzo Mobile compares.

item.title: Hackers are turning up to victim's work dressed as IT support to install malware in-person, FBI warns
item.description: If a remote session fails, hackers will come to install malware in person.

item.title: Quel bilan tirer de la vérification de l’âge sur les sites porno ? Pour Sarah El Haïry, haute commissaire à l’Enfance, « ça fonctionne »
item.description: Seize mois après l'entrée en vigueur de la loi SREN, la législation qui a contraint les principaux sites X à mettre en place des systèmes de vérification de l'âge, les effets sont-ils au rendez-vous ? La haute commissaire à l'Enfance, Sarah El Haïry, a répondu à nos questions.

item.title: EU fines Temu $232 million for selling illegal products
item.description: The European Commission has slapped Temu with a €200 million ($232 million) fine for failing to prevent the sales of illegal products on its platform.

item.title: Oura’s New Ring 5 Is Smaller and Lighter—and Adds an AI Health Coach
item.description: It’s slimmer, lighter, and more durable. But the real upgrade is Oura’s push into AI-powered health insights and proactive monitoring.

item.title: They’ve finally made the Oura Ring smaller and lighter
item.description: Wherever I go, whatever I do, people point at my finger and ask, "Is that an Oura Ring?" Lots of people find they like the design, and they tell me why they're thinking about switching to a smart ring from a smartwatch. But the people who scrunch up their noses? They usually say something along […]

item.title: Kia’s flagship EV has a battery problem
item.description: I first realized there was an issue with Kia's flagship EV9 when I tried to unlock my car last year. The hulking three-row SUV was sitting on my driveway completely dead. The key didn't work, the app connection to the car was gone, and I was already late to an appointment. Luckily, I had prepared […]

item.title: Oura unveils its Ring 5 with a thinner, lighter design starting at $399
item.description: The ring is 40% smaller than its predecessor, and comes with more accurate sensing, enhanced battery life, and more.

item.title: Widow's Bay star says he doesn't know if the buzzworthy Apple TV show will get a season 2 — but he has spoken to the comedy horror series' creator about 'what its future might be'
item.description: Hamish Linklater talks about his role in Apple's dark comedy horror TV show — and whether he could return if it gets another season.

item.title: Oura just unveiled ‘the world’s smallest smart ring’, the Oura Ring 5 — and members are going to love these 7 upgrades
item.description: The Oura Ring 5 has launched with a whole host of improvements, including several new app features for all members.

item.title: Oura's Ring 5 is a dramatically thinner smart ring
item.description: Oura describes its new wearable as the 'world's smallest' smart ring.

item.title: How to watch The Hardacres season 2 online from anywhere — it's *FREE*
item.description: The Hardacres return to face wealth, scandal, romance, and resistance. Here's how to watch The Hardacres season 2 for FREE.

item.title: The DOJ is reportedly asking Reddit and X for the identities of anti-ICE posters
item.description: Reddit and X have reportedly received grand jury subpoenas from the Justice Department, seeking the identities of users who posted about ICE.

item.title: Temu fined more than $230 million by EU over illegal product sales
item.description: Temu has been fined €200 million (about $232 million) by the European Commission after it found that consumers are "very likely to encounter illegal items" on the popular Chinese e-commerce platform. According to the commission, Temu breached Digital Service Act (DSA) rules by failing to identify and assess the systemic risks of illegal products being […]...

item.title: Ce TV Philips QLED et Ambilight de 65 pouces perd 150 € : l’immersion grand format à prix doux
item.description: Le Philips 65PUS9060 est un téléviseur très complet tant sur la partie vidéo grâce à la 4K et au Dolby Vision que sur la partie audio avec la présence du Dolby Atmos. En ce moment, son prix baisse à 699 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: How to make a podcast clip on Spotify
item.description: Spotify's podcast Clips feature lets you share a snippet with your friends instead of the entire episode — and it seems to be a win for podcasters.

item.title: Flash Geekom mini PC sale: The A7 Max gets a special price cut for one day only — plus a secret coupon code to save on the AI-ready Geekom A9 Max
item.description: The mini PC maker is cutting prices on a range of compact computers that you won't want to miss.

item.title: Déjà une claque visuelle sur PC, 007 First Light prépare une mise à jour graphique monumentale pour cet été
item.description: Malgré des critiques souvent dithyrambiques, 007 First Light n'a pas été lancé dans sa forme finale ce mardi 26 mai. Le jeu d'IO Interactive devrait recevoir une mise à jour technique d'envergure dès cet été pour intégrer le Path Tracing sur PC. Mais tous les joueurs ne pourront pas en profiter.

item.title: Dreame officialise sa série X60 Pro : l’expérience de lavage poussée à son paroxysme
item.description: Dreame officialise sa nouvelle série X60 Pro : trois robots aspirateurs-laveurs vendus entre 1 499 et 1 799 €, et confirme l'arrivée de son module monte-escalier Cyber X. La marque chinoise pousse encore le curseur de l'automatisation, et, avec lui, celui du prix.

item.title: Rivian sets official launch date for Rivian R2
item.description: Rivian R2 has an official launch date, and it's also the date when first deliveries to customers are scheduled to happen.

item.title: Cette horloge flottante veut rendre l’heure spectaculaire
item.description: Gravity Universe Time est une horloge de bureau à lévitation magnétique qui fait flotter son pointeur en forme de boule au-dessus d’une demi-sphère. Jolie, gadget et un peu chère.

item.title: Gemini for Google Home can now use your cameras to trigger automations
item.description: Google Home is rolling out a new Gemini-powered automation feature that can trigger smart home routines based on what your security cameras can see. This is one of several updates announced yesterday for Gemini for Home, including enhanced voice command support and general stability improvements, following its early access launch in October. "We are introducing […]...

item.title: The three ethical traps that destroy change leaders
item.description: The danger of ‘ethical fading’ and what to do about it. In January 2026, Anthropic published an 84-page constitution for Claude, its AI model that’s notable for what it doesn’t do: it doesn’t list rules. Instead, it explains why Claude should behave in certain ways, so the model can reason through situations its creators never anticipated.

item.title: Cotopaxi Allpa 35L Travel Pack Del Día Dark: Sustainable and Chic
item.description: Created from fabric scraps that would otherwise end up in a landfill, this thoughtfully constructed bag looks great and can carry everything you need for a weeklong trip.

item.title: New Moms Are Returning to Coding Jobs Radically Reshaped by AI
item.description: New mothers working in software development are staring down an AI-pilled workplace they barely recognize.

item.title: EU to back European alternatives to US dominated software and services in major push for ‘tech sovereignty’
item.description: European Commission reportedly preparing to back EU software vendors even more by stamping out fakes.

item.title: This map tracks 4,000 AI data centers being built—and reveals where the biggest boom is
item.description: The crowdsourced map, launched by environmental activist Erin Brockovich, shows construction across Texas, Pennsylvania, Ohio, and other states. Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has launched a crowdsourced map that tracks more than 4,000 major AI data centers across the United States.

item.title: Healthcare cyber risk grows as visibility gaps expose third-party threats
item.description: Hidden third-party access risks leave healthcare organizations exposed without real-time visibility and continuous monitoring controls.

item.title: Dreame X60 Pro Ultra Complete : Dreame vient d’annoncer son aspirateur robot ultime [Sponso]
item.description: Dreame vient-il tout simplement de présenter l’aspirateur robot le plus évolué jamais créé ? Retour sur la présentation du dernier fleuron de la marque, le X60 Pro Ultra Complete.

item.title: Here’s why change is so exhausting, according to neuroscience
item.description: Why constant transformation is exhausting workforces. Organizations today are running what amounts to a continuous stress experiment on their people. Restructuring, digital transformation, remote and hybrid transitions, supply chain reorganisation and the rapid arrival of AI—change has become the permanent condition of working life. Leaders are puzzled or irritated when people resist, disengage or seem unable to get on board....

item.title: I asked ChatGPT to make my daily walks less boring and more mindful — and it changed how I see my neighborhood
item.description: I used ChatGPT to make my routine neighborhood walks feel less repetitive

item.title: Immersive tech’s next phase of visual experiences
item.description: Immersive tech’s next phase. Seamless, AI-driven experiences built into everyday devices.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG: Mega Zygarde ex Premium Collection gets massive price cut — save over $10 at Amazon
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Mega Zygarde ex Premium Collection for $54.50 with promos, a sticker, and eight booster packs.

item.title: La vengeance d’Elon Musk : Tesla reprend sa couronne face à BYD en Europe
item.description: Après une année 2025 chaotique sur tous les plans, la situation de Tesla était particulièrement fragilisée. Mais les ventes de voitures électriques du constructeur américain ont signé en Europe un troisième mois consécutif de hausse en avril 2026.

item.title: The Roku 65-inch TV is at its lowest-ever price at Amazon — save $70
item.description: Find the best TV deal at Amazon. Save 16% on the Roku Smart TV 65-inch at Amazon.

item.title: Verizon is giving away Fox One for free ahead of the FIFA World Cup — how to claim
item.description: Verizon is offering customers three months of Fox One for free ahead of the FIFA World Cup when they sign up for a Verizon Home Internet plan.

item.title: Canon EOS R6 Mark III Review: A Serious Upgrade
item.description: With sharper resolution and lightning-fast performance, Canon’s latest full-frame mirrorless punches well above its class.

item.title: The new reality of critical infrastructure security in the age of hybrid threats
item.description: With hybrid threats, from cyber, perimeter and air, how do security operators protect Critical National Infrastructure?
